nasb.text: The men said to her, “We shall be free from this oath to you which you have made us swear,

esv.text: The men said to her, “We will be guiltless with respect to this oath of yours that you have made us swear.

cnv.text: 他們二人對她說：“如果你不遵照我們的話行，你叫我們起的誓就與我們無關了。

ccb.text: 二人对她说：“要让我们信守誓言，你必须这样做，
